title: Why Desktop #Hermes Beats #Telegram for Real Work
summary: Keith AI argues that Desktop Hermes outperforms Telegram for productive work. The video covers sessions, profiles, and artifacts as key features distinguishing Hermes.
writeup: Keith AI makes the case that Desktop Hermes is better suited to productive work than Telegram. The argument rests on three features: sessions, profiles, and artifacts. These capabilities are presented as the distinguishing factors that separate Hermes from Telegram for getting real work done.
